note: GitHub Pages is a static demo. These packets are prebuilt examples; arbitrary packet generation requires the API or CLI.

action.escalation_action: If there is no response, follow up with the official complaint/reference number and the same evidence packet. Start with: Use GBA/BBMP local corporation channels for streetlight maintenance; use BESCOM if wording indicates outage, wires, transformer, or power-distribution failure.
action.legal_or_rti_action: For a persistent unresolved issue, ask the department for written status, responsible office, and related work/order records for Bellanduru. Use RTI only for official records; do not include private account details outside official workflows.
action.message_draft: Hello, I want to report a streetlight issue at Bellanduru. Ward/corporation: 45 Bellanduru / East. I can share photos, pin/landmark, date/time, and recurrence details. For public context: I found public work/payment rows that may help frame the issue; they are not proof of field resolution. Please route this to Greater Bengaluru Authority / local city corporation and share the official complaint/reference number.
action.primary_action: File a civic streetlight maintenance complaint for Bellanduru; include pole number, photo, and landmark or pin.
what_not_to_claim: private phone numbers
claims that a listed work proves the light is fixed

who_to_contact: Use GBA/BBMP local corporation channels for streetlight maintenance; use BESCOM if wording indicates outage, wires, transformer, or power-distribution failure.

action.escalation_action: If there is no response, follow up with the official complaint/reference number and the same evidence packet. Start with: Use BESCOM 1912, BESCOM online channels, or official WhatsApp channels for outages and electrical safety.
action.legal_or_rti_action: For a persistent unresolved issue, ask the department for written status, responsible office, and related work/order records for Bellanduru. Use RTI only for official records; do not include private account details outside official workflows.
action.message_draft: Hello, I want to report a power issue at Bellanduru. Ward/corporation: 45 Bellanduru / East. I can share photos, pin/landmark, date/time, and recurrence details. I did not find matching public work/payment rows for this exact issue yet. I will share account or private details only inside the official form, not in public messages. Please route this to Bengaluru Electricity Supply Company and share the official complaint/reference number.
action.primary_action: Contact BESCOM for Bellanduru; treat sparking wires, transformer issues, or shock risk as an electrical safety issue.

account numbers outside official BESCOM workflows
